title: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement, cutting third-party vendors
snippet: Meta is ditching human moderators for AI again, cutting back third-party vendors in favor of AI for content enforcement.

title: OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent (1067 points)
snippet: Open source AI coding agent with 524 comments. Massive community interest.

title: Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record (EFF, 302 points)
snippet: EFF argues that blocking Internet Archive access won't stop AI training but will destroy the web's historical record.

title: AI Team OS – Turn Claude Code into a Self-Managing AI Team
snippet: Open source project to orchestrate multiple Claude Code agents as a self-managing AI team.

title: Senior European journalist suspended over AI-generated quotes
snippet: A senior journalist was suspended after using AI to generate quotes in articles.

title: Show HN: A deterministic middleware to compress LLM prompts by 50-80%
snippet: Skillware framework with a Prompt Token Rewriter that strips conversational filler from agentic loops, saving token costs without extra model calls.

title: project-nomad: AI-powered offline survival computer (2,054 stars today)
snippet: AI-powered offline survival computer. Top trending repository today.

title: vllm-omni: Framework for omni-modality model inference (82 stars today)
snippet: vLLM extension supporting omni-modality (text, image, audio, video) model inference.

title: What happened at Nvidia GTC 2026
snippet: Recap of Nvidia's annual developer conference GTC 2026, covering announcements and developments.

title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
snippet: Microsoft is scaling back Copilot AI features on Windows after user feedback about bloat.

title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned
snippet: Court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned on military AI cooperation.

title: DoorDash launches Tasks app to train AI with gig worker recordings
snippet: DoorDash's new Tasks app pays gig workers to record videos of daily activities to train AI models.

title: Jeff Bezos reportedly aims to raise $100 billion to buy and revamp manufacturing firms with AI
snippet: Bezos is trying to raise $100 billion to acquire manufacturing firms and infuse them with AI.

title: DoorDash's Tasks app shows the bleak future of AI gig work
snippet: Gig workers are paid to record themselves doing laundry, cooking, and walking around to train AI in DoorDash's new Tasks app.

title: Kimi K2.5 powers Cursor's new Composer 2 via Fireworks AI
snippet: Kimi.ai confirms Kimi-k2.5 provides the foundation for Cursor's Composer 2, accessed via Fireworks AI RL and inference platform.

title: Turbo Pascal 3.02A deconstructed using Claude — 39KB binary with full IDE and compiler
snippet: Used Claude to decompile and interpret Borland's 1985 Turbo Pascal 3.02 executable — a 39,731-byte file containing a full text editor IDE and Pascal compiler.

title: FinTradeBench: Financial reasoning benchmark for LLMs — NASDAQ-100 over 10 years
snippet: New benchmark evaluating financial reasoning that integrates company fundamentals and trading signals. 1,400 questions over 10-year window. 14 LLMs evaluated.

title: 2026年AI泛滥，年轻人只为「活人感」买单
snippet: AI内容泛滥的2026年，年轻人开始更重视真实的人际互动体验，「活人感」成为消费新趋势。港中文95后博士做了AI可穿戴硬件，定位全天候情感导师。

title: 8万人对话Claude后，Anthropic发现人类对AI的真实渴望
snippet: Anthropic访谈8万名Claude用户，发现人类对AI的愿景与担忧交织，且存在显著的地域差异。

title: Trump's AI framework targets state laws — federal preemption push
snippet: The Trump administration's new AI framework seeks to preempt state-level AI regulation, centralizing federal control over AI policy.
